description: Create a Link Analysis Diagram visualizing the connections in the Watergate scandal based on the dossier provided in 'watergate_notes.txt' on the Desktop. The diagram must include three distinct visual zones for 'The White House', 'CREEP', and 'The Operatives', illustrating the flow of relationships and reporting lines from the burglars up to the President. Ensure all connection lines are labeled with the nature of the relationship. Save the diagram as 'watergate_map.drawio' and export it as 'watergate_map.png', both on the Desktop.
